speaker: speaker1
text: You are looking really healthy lately . What are you doing differently ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you for noticing ! I've been making a few lifestyle changes over the past year .

speaker: speaker1
text: Tell me about it . I'm interested .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , it all started when my brother challenged me to quit smoking .

speaker: speaker1
text: Ha ! That's right . You used to smoke . I forgot !

speaker: speaker2
text: When I kicked that habit , I found I had so much more energy . I started exercising .

speaker: speaker2
text: No . I like to be outside . I took up hiking and mountain biking .
